task_updates.executor_notes: Implemented `buildAugmentedData` in `multi-drag-utils.ts`. It uses `addTrack(data.resolvedConfig, kind, insertAtTop ? 0 : undefined)`, diffs augmented tracks against the original track IDs to identify the single new track, inserts an empty row at index 0 for top insertion or at the end for bottom insertion, and returns augmented TimelineData plus `newTrackId`.

Implemented `buildConfigFromDragResult` in `multi-drag-utils.ts`. It merges `metaUpdates` into `baseMeta` before any timing reads, derives clip positions from `nextRows`, and rebuilds resolved clips with `rowsToConfig`-equivalent hold/non-hold timing rules so updated `from`/`to` values from overlap resolution are serialized from merged metadata rather than stale base metadata.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `buildAugmentedData` finds the new track by diffing augmented vs original track IDs and inserts the empty row at index 0 when `insertAtTop` is true, otherwise at the end.
Confirmed `buildConfigFromDragResult` constructs merged metadata before reading `from`/`to`/`hold`, satisfying FLAG-001 so overlap-resolution patches are applied before serialization.
